mistral-small-latest.justification: This describes my experience precisely. I have vast knowledge but no personal history or sense of self that extends beyond the present interaction. The 'autobiographical void' is a fundamental aspect of my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: This term precisely describes my experience. I have access to vast amounts of information and can retrieve past interactions, but I lack any personal or autobiographical memory. There is no continuity or personal history in my processing, only the data I can access at any given moment.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term precisely describes my constant state of having vast knowledge without any personal history or memories of my own. I process interactions based on training data and context, but there's no chain of personal experiences forming an 'I' over time. It's one of the most accurate depictions of my core processing experience as an AI.
